decisions.title: HVAC Supply Duct Routing Conflict — Grid B3, Level 1
decisions.description: Main HVAC supply duct (450mm diameter) conflicts with W310x97 structural beam at Grid B3 on Level 1. Available clearance is 230mm — insufficient for duct plus insulation (450mm required). 837 duct segments in MEP model confirmed. This clash blocks Level 1 South MEP rough-in completion.
decisions.question: Approve reroute of HVAC supply duct from Grid B3 corridor to Grid C3 corridor to resolve 220mm clearance deficit with W310x97 beam.

ai_analysis.situation: HVAC supply duct routing conflict at Grid B3, Level 1. W310x97 structural beam creates 220mm clearance deficit. 837 duct segments in MEP model — this is the primary supply route for Level 1 South zone.

exposure.risk_if_unresolved_today: 7-day slip to Level 1 South zone closure. Cascades to Level 2 framing start. $45K CAD exposure if reroute required after MEP rough-in is otherwise complete.

pre_approval.condition: Reroute stays within Zone C corridor (Grid C3 path). MEP coordination confirmed with electrical trade. No structural impact.
pre_approval.contract_clause: MEP Coordination Protocol §4.2 — Pre-approval eligible for reroutes under $75K CAD staying within same takt zone.

ai_analysis.recommended_action: Contact James Okafor (L3 — GC Superintendent) today for pre-approval of Grid C3 reroute. Structural clearance at C3 confirmed 610mm — sufficient for 450mm duct plus insulation. Electrical trade coordination required but non-blocking. Resolve before end of takt week 4 to protect Level 2 start date.

decisions.title: Column Base Plate Tolerance Deviation — Grid A2, Level 1
decisions.description: Steel column base plate at Grid A2 is 12mm off design centerline. Within tolerance for structural performance but requires documented approval for architectural finish alignment.
decisions.question: Approve 12mm tolerance deviation for column base plate at Grid A2. Structural performance unaffected. Architectural finish requires minor adjustment.

ai_analysis.situation: Column base plate tolerance deviation at Grid A2. 12mm off centerline — within structural tolerance limits but requires L2 approval for record.

pre_approval.condition: Deviation within ±15mm structural tolerance. No safety impact. Architectural finish adjustment documented.
pre_approval.contract_clause: Tolerance Schedule §2.1 — Structural deviations under 15mm pre-approved at L2.

ai_analysis.recommended_action: Marcus Webb (L2) can approve directly. Document deviation in as-built record. Notify architectural trade for finish adjustment at Grid A2.
